title: More stars
description: Don't like the small number of stars in the night sky? Let's add more!
body:
When you look at the night sky in Minecraft, you've probably wondered: "Why are there so few stars?" I asked myself that same question. That's why this mod was created.

This mod increases the number of stars from 1,500 to 20,000 (almost 13.5 times) and reduces their size by a third. Now you can enjoy a more beautiful night sky than in regular Minecraft!

The mod has no dependencies, just drop it into the mods folder and enjoy the game!

**Night sky without mod**
![Night sky without mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e7233f9bad3bc3dc74a114c8a063630b32131669_0.webp)

**Night sky with mod**
![Night sky with mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb0744c70248aa022870238adf59fac6c242af7b_0.webp)
